headline: GoDaddy’s (NYSE:GDDY) Q1 CY2026 Earnings Results: Revenue In Line With Expectations
summary: Domain registrar and web services company GoDaddy (NYSE:GDDY) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 6.1% year on year to $1.27 billion. The company expects next quarter’s revenue to be around $1.30 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its GAAP profit of $1.60 per share was 5.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: GoDaddy (NYSE:GDDY) Earnings Deliver Mixed Results, Stock Rises on Profitability Beat
summary: GoDaddy (GDDY) beat Q1 EPS estimates at $1.60, driving stock up 3.2% after-hours despite a slight revenue miss. Strong margins and operational discipline outweighed the top-line shortfall.

headline: GoDaddy Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
